title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: SAINT VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE THRIFT AND CONSIGNMENT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store offering donated household items, such as clothing, linens, books, and furniture, also accepts donations of similar items. Limited dontation pick up is available. 51661 Huntington Road La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations: Monday -Saturday 10am- until capacity is reached Email (541) 536-1956 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 536-1956 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call for accepted donation items and pick up options FEES: Varies by item. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Book/Magazine Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
